list.chartDescription: Sum of value and cost across active positions ({{currency}}).

home.subtitle: Composition and trend across all five subtypes.
home.valueCostChartTitle: Total value and cost over time
home.categoryStackDescription: Percentage of total value by category, month-by-month ({{currency}}).
home.categoryPieDescription: Share of current value by category ({{currency}}).
home.riskPieDescription: Share of current value by risk profile ({{currency}}).

snapshotRow.deleteDescription: The {{month}} reading will be hidden from reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.

quantityPriceSnapshot.createDescription: Enter the month-end quantity and price per unit. The total value is derived ({{currency}}).
quantityPriceSnapshot.editDescription: Update the quantity, price, statement date, or description. To change the month, delete and re-create.

accruedInterestSnapshot.createDescription: Enter the month-end total value and the accrued interest component ({{currency}}). Total already includes accrued.
accruedInterestSnapshot.editDescription: Update the total value, accrued, statement date, or description. To change the month, delete and re-create.
accruedInterestSnapshot.accruedHint: Leave accrued at 0 if your bond pays coupons directly to your bank account each period (Indonesian govt-primary retail: ORI/SBR/SR/ST). Override for secondary-market bonds and time deposits where interest accrues inside the instrument.

trade.buyDescription: Quantity acquired and the price paid per unit. Total cash out is derived ({{currency}}).
trade.sellDescription: Quantity sold and the price received per unit. Total cash in is derived ({{currency}}).
trade.editDescription: Adjust the trade date, quantity, price, or description.

cashIncome.createDescription: Cash payment received from the instrument. This will not update any bank balance — the cash appears in the next bank statement.
cashIncome.editDescription: Adjust the payment date, amount, or description.

fee.createDescription: Manager-imposed fee. Set quantity + price only when the manager settles by removing units (e.g., gold storage fees). NAV-embedded fees on mutual funds are already in the price snapshot — don't record them here.
fee.editDescription: Adjust the fee date, amount, deducted units, or description.
fee.incompleteHint: If recording a unit-settled fee, fill in both quantity and price.

maturityTxn.createDescription: Position reached its scheduled end. Record principal, interest, and what happened to each. Rolled portions imply a fresh position record — create it separately if needed.
maturityTxn.editDescription: Adjust the principal, interest, dispositions, or description.

transactionRow.deleteDescription: The {{label}} on {{date}} will be hidden from the ledger. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.

stock.listSubtitle: Listed equities — tracked by ticker and exchange, with monthly quantity-and-price snapshots.
stock.emptyBody: Create your first stock position to start tracking month-end quantity and price.
stock.deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
stock.deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
stock.createDescription: Track a listed equity. Monthly snapshots record quantity and price per unit; the total value derives from those.
stock.editDescription: Currency is not editable — create a new position if it needs to change. Ownership is editable.
stock.snapshotsDescription: Monthly quantity and price readings (manual entry).
stock.snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's quantity and price.
stock.transactionsDescription: Trades, dividends, and fees. Cash impacts do not auto-update bank balances.
stock.transactionsEmpty: No transactions yet. Record a Buy or Dividend to start the ledger.
stock.reconcileWarning: Latest snapshot quantity ({{actual}} sh) doesn't match ledger total ({{expected}} sh). Snapshots remain the source of truth — review trades or fees if this is unexpected.

tour.overviewBody: Everything about one stock holding — its current value, what you paid, and every trade and dividend.
tour.headlineBody: “Total cost” is tallied from your Buy and Sell transactions. Profit or loss compares it to the latest recorded value.
tour.actionsBody: Tap “+ New snapshot” to record this month's value (shares × price), or “Import from spreadsheet” to add several months at once.
tour.detailsBody: The ticker and basics were set when you added the stock. Use “Edit” to change them.
tour.chartBody: The shaded area is the recorded value each month; the line beneath is your cost. The gap between them is your gain.
tour.snapshotsBody: Each row records a month's share count and price. Add a snapshot whenever you have a fresh statement.
tour.transactionsBody: Record every Buy and Sell — they drive your cost basis — plus dividends received and any fees.

mutualFund.listSubtitle: Pooled funds tracked by code and fund manager. Snapshots record month-end units and NAV.
mutualFund.emptyBody: Create your first mutual fund position to start tracking month-end units and NAV.
mutualFund.deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
mutualFund.deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
mutualFund.createDescription: Track a pooled fund. Monthly snapshots record units held and NAV per unit; the total value derives from those.
mutualFund.editDescription: Currency is not editable — create a new position if it needs to change. Ownership is editable.
mutualFund.snapshotsDescription: Monthly units and NAV readings (manual entry).
mutualFund.snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's units and NAV.
mutualFund.transactionsDescription: Trades, distributions, and fees. Cash impacts do not auto-update bank balances.
mutualFund.transactionsEmpty: No transactions yet. Record a Buy or Distribution to start the ledger.
mutualFund.reconcileWarning: Latest snapshot units ({{actual}}) don't match ledger total ({{expected}}). Snapshots remain the source of truth — review trades or fees if this is unexpected.

tour.overviewTitle: Your mutual fund at a glance
tour.overviewBody: Everything about one fund holding — its value, what you invested, and every trade and distribution.
tour.headlineBody: “Total cost” is tallied from your Buy and Sell transactions. Profit or loss compares it to the latest recorded value.
tour.actionsBody: Tap “+ New snapshot” to record this month's value (units × NAV), or “Import from spreadsheet” to add several months at once.
tour.detailsBody: The fund's basics were set when you added it. Use “Edit” to change them.
tour.chartBody: The shaded area is the recorded value each month; the line beneath is your cost. The gap between them is your gain.
tour.snapshotsBody: Each row records a month's unit count and NAV. Add a snapshot whenever you have a fresh statement.
tour.transactionsBody: Record every Buy and Sell — they drive your cost basis — plus distributions received and any fees.

bond.listSubtitle: Fixed-income instruments — tracked by series, issuer, coupon, and maturity, with monthly accrued-interest snapshots.
bond.emptyBody: Create your first bond position to start tracking month-end value and accrued interest.
bond.deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
bond.deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
bond.createDescription: Track a fixed-income instrument by face value, coupon, and maturity. Monthly snapshots record the dirty total value and the accrued-interest component.
bond.editDescription: Currency is fixed at creation. Ownership is editable.
bond.snapshotsDescription: Monthly total value and accrued-interest breakdown.
bond.snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's reading. For held-to-maturity bonds (Indonesian govt-primary where coupons pay out to your bank account), a single initial snapshot at face value is enough — snapshot carry-forward handles every subsequent month until maturity.
bond.transactionsDescription: Buys / sells (secondary market), coupons, fees, and the terminal maturity event. For Indonesian govt-primary retail bonds, log each coupon as received.
bond.transactionsEmpty: No transactions yet. Record a Buy or Coupon to start the ledger.

placeholders.faceValue: e.g. 50000000 for 50 lots of IDR 1,000,000 each

tour.overviewBody: This page holds everything about one bond — what it's worth now, what you paid for it, and every payment it makes along the way.
tour.headlineBody: “Total cost” is what the bond cost you. For a government bond bought at issue that's its face value; once you record Buy and Sell transactions, it's tallied from those instead. Profit or loss is the latest recorded value minus that cost.
tour.actionsBody: Tap “New snapshot” to record what the bond is worth this month, or “Import from spreadsheet” to bring in several months at once.
tour.detailsBody: Face value, coupon rate, and maturity date were set when you added the bond. Use “Edit” to change any of them.
tour.chartBody: The shaded area is the bond's recorded value each month; the line beneath is your cost. When the line sits below the area, the gap is your gain — your profit or loss over time.
tour.snapshotsBody: Each row is one month's recorded value. Add a snapshot whenever you get a fresh statement — and when the bond matures, the closing one is added for you automatically.
tour.transactionsBody: Log the coupons you receive and any fees — the totals above tally your income to date. Record extra Buys or Sells if you trade on the secondary market. When the bond matures, post a Maturity entry: it records the final payout, files the closing snapshot automatically, and marks the bond closed. The payout lands in your bank, not here, so for an accurate month update your bank balance for that month too — at month-end, record every position's value and your bank balances together.

timeDeposit.listSubtitle: Locked-principal bank placements — tracked by bank, rate, and term, with monthly accrued-interest snapshots.
timeDeposit.emptyBody: Create your first time deposit to start tracking month-end value and accrued interest.
timeDeposit.deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
timeDeposit.deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
timeDeposit.createDescription: Track a locked principal at a bank — fixed rate, fixed term. Monthly snapshots record the total value and the accrued-interest breakdown.
timeDeposit.editDescription: Currency is fixed at creation. Ownership is editable.
timeDeposit.subtitle: {{bank}} · {{rate}}% · {{months}}mo
timeDeposit.snapshotsDescription: Monthly total value and accrued-interest breakdown.
timeDeposit.snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's total value and accrued interest.
timeDeposit.transactionsDescription: Record the Maturity event when the term ends. The configured rollover policy seeds the disposition defaults; banks can deviate.
timeDeposit.transactionsEmpty: No transactions yet. Record a Maturity when the term ends.
timeDeposit.rolloverHint: What the bank does automatically at maturity if you take no action. Auto-renew with interest = compound; auto-renew principal = interest paid out, principal rolls; no rollover = bank releases everything to your account.

tour.overviewTitle: Your time deposit at a glance
tour.overviewBody: Everything about one deposit — its value, the principal you placed, and its maturity.
tour.headlineBody: “Total cost” is the principal you placed. Profit or loss is the latest recorded value — principal plus interest earned — minus that.
tour.actionsBody: Tap “+ New snapshot” to record this month's value including interest earned so far, or “Import from spreadsheet” for several months.
tour.detailsBody: Principal, interest rate, and maturity date were set when you opened the deposit. Use “Edit” to change them.
tour.chartBody: The shaded area is the recorded value each month; the line beneath is your principal. The gap between them is the interest earned.
tour.snapshotsBody: Each row records a month's value — principal plus the interest accrued so far.
tour.transactionsBody: A time deposit has one transaction: when it matures, post a Maturity entry for the payout, and choose whether to cash it out or roll it into a new deposit. If you cash out, the money lands in your bank, not here — update your bank balance for that month so your net worth stays accurate. At month-end, record every position's value and your bank balances together.

gold.listSubtitle: Physical or digital gold tracked by form and purity. Snapshots record month-end grams held and price per gram.
gold.emptyBody: Create your first gold position to start tracking month-end grams and price.
gold.deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
gold.deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
gold.createDescription: Track physical or digital gold. Monthly snapshots record grams held and price per gram; the total value derives from those.
gold.editDescription: Currency is not editable — create a new position if it needs to change. Ownership is editable.
gold.snapshotsDescription: Monthly grams and price-per-gram readings (manual entry).
gold.snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's grams and price.
gold.transactionsDescription: Trades and fees. Storage / unit-deduction fees affect the next snapshot's quantity.
gold.transactionsEmpty: No transactions yet. Record a Buy to start the ledger.
gold.reconcileWarning: Latest snapshot grams ({{actual}} g) don't match ledger total ({{expected}} g). Snapshots remain the source of truth — review trades or fees if this is unexpected.

tour.overviewBody: Everything about one gold holding — its value, what you paid, and every buy and sell.
tour.headlineBody: “Total cost” is tallied from your Buy and Sell transactions. Profit or loss compares it to the latest recorded value.
tour.actionsBody: Tap “+ New snapshot” to record this month's value (weight × price), or “Import from spreadsheet” to add several months at once.
tour.detailsBody: Weight and purity were set when you added the gold. Use “Edit” to change them.
tour.chartBody: The shaded area is the recorded value each month; the line beneath is your cost. The gap between them is your gain.
tour.snapshotsBody: Each row records a month's weight and price. Add a snapshot whenever the price moves or you buy more.
tour.transactionsBody: Record every Buy and Sell, plus any fees — they drive your cost basis. Gold has no dividends or coupons.
